test_result.test: claude_evaluation
test_result.details: The high hapax ratio (0.701) contradicts the hypothesis: a productive 5-prefix system would show greater word reuse. While the low Zipf exponent (0.89) suggests some compositional structure, 5 prefixes Ã— 50 stems generate only ~250 combinations against 8,261 unique words, insufficient to explain observed vocabulary density and token distribution.
